signoffs.role: non-Claude readiness reviewer; OpenAI/Codex affiliation disclosed
signoffs.rationale: Readiness review found no reference oracle or provenance, no FIXED/OPEN evidence mappings, planned rather than executable mutants, no calibration rows, and no completed independent review. This unblinded reviewer is affiliated with the Codex tool cohort and cannot substitute for the required independent blinded review.

signoffs.role: independent non-Claude reviewer; Google/Gemini affiliation disclosed
signoffs.rationale: Reviewed all canonical contract documents, oracle artifacts, mutant definitions, and source traceability. Findings: (1) oracle-provenance.json is pending with null oracle, empty authorship, and no independent review — no reference implementation exists; (2) fixed-open-evidence.json is pending with zero mappings — no FIXED or OPEN item has source-traceable evidence or an executable probe; (3) mutants/manifest.json has status=planned with 10 fault definitions but no executable mutant code; (4) expected-kill-matrix.csv contains only a header row with no calibration data; (5) adequacy-report.json is pending with empty calibration_runs and coverage. The canonical spec and proto are well-formed and reviewable, the source-to-brief traceability is thorough with Liferay commit evidence, and the 10 mutant definitions cover the required high-risk dimensions (rounding ×2, ordering ×1, candidate ×1, decimal ×1, intermediate-rounding ×1, cap ×1, price-on-request ×1, strategy ×2). However, none of this has been instantiated into executable form. Cannot accept until an independent non-Claude implementer creates the oracle, evidence mappings, and executable mutant battery. This reviewer is affiliated with the gemini-cli tool cohort under evaluation and is therefore unblinded; this does not substitute for a blinded independent review.
